title: Circular buffer for terminal output with fixed line limit
purpose: Maintains a fixed-size buffer of terminal output for reconnect replay, automatically evicting oldest lines when full.
module_context: Exports a RingBuffer class that manages terminal output with a maximum line limit and handles partial lines correctly.

steps.content: Initialize the internal lines array to empty.
Set the maximum line limit for the buffer.
IF the input data is empty, return immediately without processing.
Split the input data into parts using newline as delimiter.
Process all complete lines from the split data, adding them to the buffer.
IF adding a complete line causes the buffer to exceed maximum lines, remove the oldest line.
Handle the last part of the split data, which may be a partial line without trailing newline.
IF the last part is not empty, append it to the last line in buffer or create a new partial line.
IF the buffer exceeds maximum lines after adding the partial line, remove the oldest line.
Join all buffered lines into a single string with no separator.
Reset the internal lines array to empty.
Filter the buffered lines to include only those ending with newline character.
Return the count of filtered lines.
